about.text_html:
~6 years of full-stack development experience specializing in front-end development with ReactJS paired with NodeJS and/or Java REST API back-ends and MySQL, MongoDB, and/or Neo4j databases. 

 Currently, I am gaining experience with AI-integrated Software Engineering & Data Science as a Work-Study Apprentice at Flatiron School, where I am contributing to the development of AI-powered EdTech tools with NextJS, NodeJS, Python / FastAPI, and PostgreSQL / Supabase while simultaneously completing AI, Data Science, and Machine Learning-related coursework, with a projected graduation in April 2027.
